title: Patient Satisfaction Survey of the Knee Surgery Project
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aka5a","text":"To evaluate the satisfaction rate of patients who underwent surgical treatment of total knee arthroplasty at Hopstial Universitário Pedro Ernesto.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"507gh","text":"This protocol will be used to research the satisfaction index of patients undergoing total knee arthroplasty in a university hospital. The entire interview will be conducted over the phone and no risk or expense will be imposed on the packages.The research may guide possible improvements to the assistance service offered at the university.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"9dc6t","text":"The entire interview will be conducted over the phone and no risk or expense will be imposed on the packages.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"163cr","text":"We will interview, by telephone, all patients who underwent total knee arthroplasty at Hospital Universitário Pedro Ernesto in 2020,","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To raise the files of all patients who underwent total knee arthroplasty at the Pedro Ernesto University Hospital in 2020.
Make telephone contact and explain the content and importance of the research to improve the quality of assistance
Conduct the interview with nine questions for patients who agree to participate.
creator: Fabrício Bolpato Loures
